ground_truth.description: Clearly a photo of Times Square taken at night. American flag on pole visible.
ground_truth.photographer_description: Clearly a photo of Times Square taken at night. An American flag on a pole is also visible (although it's just hanging down and not waving). You can see Marriott Marquis building, H&M signage, and American Eagle Outfitters signage. This one is very straightforward.

details.description: Nighttime street scene in Times Square, Manhattan, packed with pedestrians and wet reflective pavement. The view looks down the bright canyon of Broadway/Seventh Avenue with dense illuminated LED billboards on all sides. Center background is the narrow tower of One Times Square covered in full-height digital screens. At left stands a dark glass-and-steel skyscraper with red H&M logos and a purple-lit spire (4 Times Square/Condé Nast Building). At right is the tall slab of the New York Marriott Marquis with the American Eagle Outfitters vertical facade sign. In the foreground left are the glass structures and stairs of the TKTS booth beneath the red steps area of Father Duffy Square. Numerous brand signs (Disney Store, Sephora, Samsung, etc.) animate the scene, and a U.S. flag rises from a pole near the center. Overall lighting is dominated by neon and LED displays against a dark sky.

details.description: A vibrant nighttime street scene in Times Square, Midtown Manhattan, New York. The view looks down a pedestrian plaza crowded with people, flanked by tall buildings covered in bright digital billboards and neon advertisements. The skyline is dominated by a tall building with a purple-lit antenna (One Times Square) and a visible red H&M sign near the top. To the right, a Marriott Marquis facade is illuminated alongside more signage. On the left, a prominent Disney Store storefront is lit among screens displaying colorful ads. The foreground includes an escalator-like glass enclosure and a lively mix of locals and tourists beneath a cacophony of glowing displays. The atmosphere is quintessentially New York — busy, glossy, and neon-lit—captured as a nighttime Times Square moment.

details.description: Nighttime street scene in Times Square, Manhattan, filled with crowds and surrounded by towering buildings covered in bright LED billboards and advertisements. The view looks south from the north end of the plaza near the TKTS red steps, with the slender One Times Square tower centered in the distance, the Marriott Marquis rising to the right, and the spired tower with prominent H&M signage to the left. American Eagle Outfitters screens, Disney Store signage, and many other digital displays light the area while people walk, sit, and take photos around Father Duffy Square.

details.description: A bustling nighttime street scene in Times Square, Manhattan, New York City. The wide pedestrian plaza is filled with people, with tall glass-clad buildings on either side whose façades are covered in vibrant digital billboards and neon advertising. An American flag is visible in the foreground near a lit escalator on the left, and a prominent red H&M sign sits atop a building toward the center-left, with a purple antenna-like structure glowing above it. The scene conveys the energy of a major commercial district illuminated by neon signage.

details.description: A vibrant night view of Times Square in New York City, looking south from Father Duffy Square. The scene is illuminated by massive digital billboards and neon signage. In the foreground, a dense crowd of pedestrians fills the wet pavement, reflecting the city lights. To the left, the glass railing and structure of the famous red TKTS steps are visible. Dominating the left skyline is the skyscraper at 4 Times Square (formerly the Condé Nast Building) topped with a spire and a bright pink "H&M" logo. Below it, signage for the Disney Store and the musical "Tootsie" can be seen on the facade of 1540 Broadway. On the right side, the New York Marriott Marquis hotel (1535 Broadway) displays a colossal screen advertising Samsung and the Galaxy Note 10+, alongside vertical signage for American Eagle Outfitters at 1551 Broadway. In the center distance, the narrow profile of One Times Square is visible with "2019" signage. An American flag flies prominently on a pole in the left foreground. A "Wafels & Dinges" food kiosk stands on the right sidewalk. A mounted police officer on horseback is silhouetted against the bright screens in the middle ground.

details.description: A vibrant night scene of Times Square in New York City, characterized by towering skyscrapers adorned with massive, glowing LED billboards and advertisements. In the center, a large American flag flies at half-mast. To the left, the red glass steps of the TKTS booth are partially visible, while the 'Disney Store' and 'Tootsie' musical advertisements dominate the lower left. In the background, the 4 Times Square building (formerly the Condé Nast Building) is identifiable by its prominent 'H&M' logo and a purple-lit spire. To the right, the New York Marriott Marquis hotel and an 'American Eagle Outfitters' sign are visible. A bronze statue of Father Duffy on a pedestal stands in the middle ground. The foreground is filled with a diverse crowd of people walking and sitting near a 'Wafels & Dinges' food stand. The lighting is artificial and intense, reflecting off the wet pavement.

details.description: Nighttime street-level view of Times Square in Midtown Manhattan. Crowded pedestrian plaza with the TKTS glass structure/steps and a U.S. flagpole in the foreground. The center skyline features One Times Square with stacked LED screens and the spire that hosts the New Year’s Eve ball. To the left rises 4 Times Square (Condé Nast Building) with a purple-lit antenna and large H&M logos. On the right is the New York Marriott Marquis with its curved facade, alongside tall digital billboards including American Eagle Outfitters. Visible storefront/billboard signage includes the Disney Store and Sephora. Dense high-rise towers, brilliant LED advertising, and nighttime lighting define the scene.

details.description: A vibrant nighttime street scene in Times Square, New York City, dominated by an array of bright digital billboards and neon signs. On the left, glass-clad skyscrapers rise above a crowded pedestrian plaza; a tall building in the center features a purple-lit antenna, likely One Times Square. Prominent signage includes a red H&M sign atop a nearby building, the Marriott Marquis signage on a tower to the right, and various storefronts such as the Disney Store. An American flag is raised on a pole among the people. Ground-level activity includes a dense crowd of pedestrians, with some seated along a railing on the right and others walking or browsing the vendor stalls displaying advertisements for electronics and food.

details.description: Nighttime street-level view of Times Square in Midtown Manhattan with dense crowds on the pedestrian plaza and reflective wet pavement. Towering LED billboards fill the scene. Center distance is the narrow, vertically stacked-ad screen of One Times Square. To the left, the dark glass tower with a purple-lit spire carries large red H&M logos (4 Times Square). On the right, the curved facade of the New York Marriott Marquis faces the plaza, beside a tall American Eagle Outfitters display. Additional signage includes the Disney Store and various Broadway advertisements. A U.S. flag flies above the plaza as people queue near kiosks and food stands.

details.description: Nighttime street scene in Times Square, Manhattan, NYC. A crowded pedestrian promenade is flanked by tall, illuminated buildings and towering digital billboards and neon signs. The ground is polished and reflective, catching the glow of the screens. An American flag on a flagpole is visible toward the center, with a purple-lit spire atop a nearby building in the distance. Brand signage is prominent, including H&M on a dark tower, Marriott Marquis on a curved facade, and Disney Store storefronts along the lower levels, with other storefronts such as Waffle/ice cream kiosks visible. The atmosphere is lively and commercial, typical of a major-city nightlife hub.

details.description: A vibrant, eye-level nighttime photograph looking south through the heart of Times Square in New York City. The scene is densely packed with pedestrians walking on wet pavement, suggesting recent rain. In the immediate foreground on the right, the dark bronze statue of Father Francis P. Duffy stands on a pedestal, with a 'Wafels & Dinges' food kiosk nearby. To the left, the glass railing and structure of the TKTS red steps are partially visible. The background is dominated by towering skyscrapers covered in illuminated digital billboards and signage. Notable buildings include the New York Marriott Marquis on the right, displaying a massive Samsung ad and vertical American Eagle Outfitters signage. In the center distance, the H&M building (4 Times Square) rises with its distinctive spire lit in purple. On the left, 1540 Broadway features Disney Store signage and advertisements for Broadway shows like 'Tootsie' and 'Come From Away'. An American flag flies from a pole near the center of the frame.

details.description: A vibrant nighttime view of Times Square in New York City, characterized by a dense crowd of pedestrians and towering skyscrapers covered in bright digital billboards. Notable advertisements include H&M, Samsung, Disney, and American Eagle Outfitters. In the foreground, people are walking through the pedestrian plaza, with a 'Wafels & Dinges' food stand and the George M. Cohan statue visible on the right. To the left, the glass structure of the TKTS booth is partially seen. An American flag flies at half-mast in the center of the frame. The 4 Times Square building, topped with a purple-lit spire and H&M logo, dominates the central background.
